Headline: #22 Clark and #152 Addison Temporary Reroute near Clark/Addison
ShortDescription: #22 Clark and #152 Addison buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to a Cubs game near Clark/Addison.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#22 Clark and #152 Addison buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to a Cubs game near Clark/Addison.

#22 Clark buses will operate via Clark, Racine, Belmont, then resume their normal route on Clark.

#152 Addison buses will operate via Addison, Racine, Belmont, Halsted, then resume their normal route on Addison.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #91 Austin Temporary Reroute at Austin/Leland
ShortDescription: 91 Austin buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions, due to street blockage near Austin/Leland.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#91 Austin buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Austin, Lawrence, Central, Montrose and Austin, over normal route, due to street blockage near Austin/Leland.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #76 Diversey Temporary Eastbound Reroute near Diversey/Menard
ShortDescription: EB 76 Diversey buses are temp. rerouted via Diversey, Austin, Fullerton Central and Diversey, over normal route, due to police activity near Diversey/Menard.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Eastbound #76 Diversey buses are temporarily rerouted via Diversey, Austin, Fullerton Central and Diversey, over normal route, due to police activity near Diversey/Menard.

Westbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
